---
title: "Hands-0n Exercise 2:"
subtitle:  "Beyond ggplot2 Fundamentals"
date: "20 Apr 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
editor: visual
execute:
  freeze: auto
  echo: true
  eval: true
  warning: false
---

# 1. Overview

# 2. Getting Started

::: panel-tabset
## Installing and loading libraries

## Importing data
:::

::: panel-tabset
## Data summary

## Data preview
:::

# 3. Beyond ggplot2: ggrepel

## 3.1 Working with ggrepel

# 4. Beyond ggplot2: Themes

::: panel-tabset
## ggthemes

## hrbthemes
:::

# 5. Beyond Single Graph

::: panel-tabset
## Math Scores

## English Scores

## Math vs English
:::

## 5.1 Creating Composite Graphics: pathwork methods

## 5.2 Combining two ggplot2 graphs

::: panel-tabset
## Horizontal

## Vertical

## Relative area
:::

## 5.3 Combining three ggplot2 graphs

::: panel-tabset
## / and \| operators

## - operator (subtrack placement)

## Nested layouts

## With non-ggplot content
:::

## 5.4 Creating a composite figure with tag

::: panel-tabset
## Enumeration

## With tagging
:::

## 5.5 Creating figure with inset

## 5.6 Composite figure: Patchwork + ggtheme

::: panel-tabset
## theme_economist()

## theme_solarized
:::

# 6. References
